item.title: stock-app
item.description: Developed a web application that tracks products from leading retailers using a REST API which notifies users when a product is available. GitHub Secrets and GitHub Actions are used to automate CI/CD workflows for docker running on AWS Elastic Beanstalk.

item.title: Memorize
item.description: Developed a mobile application that allows you to play a fun card-matching game designed for iOS devices. You can win the game by selecting two identical cards, once all matching cards have been found and flipped over the game can be reset and played again.

item.title: vpn-application
item.description: Developed a desktop application that allows you to connect to a remote server with the help of OpenVPN via UDP or TCP network protocols. Included a 32-minute video demonstrating how to code the application and configure network protocols.
